title: Surgeon Vacancy at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates!
